headline: Zoetis Inc (NYSE:ZTS): A Top Value Stock with Undervalued Strength
summary: Zoetis (ZTS) offers a rare value opportunity with a P/E of 11.83, top-tier profitability, steady growth, and strong cash flow—a compelling buy for disciplined value investors.
